title: Knarfy's "Perfect Minecraft"
description: An unofficial collection of the mods from Knarfy's fixing Minecraft video.
body:
This modpack is a collection of the mods from knarfy's video of him solving all of minecraft's problems. I have them here to make it easier to set up

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ii27zJ0tSG4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### This modpack includes amazing features that will definatally change your game such as:




- All Items stacking up to 64
- No pillager outposts spawning (because they aren't symmetrical)
- Every hostile mob being replaced with a warden
- Vertical slabs
- Fletching table functionality
- And many more

## FAQ
<details>
<summary>Is this modback dumb?</summary>

Yes, this is stupid.

</details>
